series_title: Ohio Lottery Game Show Raw Feed Digital Files
series_description: 1) Digital video copies of actual Ohio Lottery Game Shows, which airs on TV. The digital copy reflects how the Show is actually viewed by the public in its regularly scheduled time slot on TV. 2) Raw feed digital copy of activities related to the production and or the Ohio Lottery Game Show. The raw feed digital copy enables the public and the Ohio Lottery Commission to view activities, which take place before and during the taping of the Ohio Lottery Game Show. It is in unedited format and can be used to ascertain whether a problem arose during the taping of the Ohio Lottery Game Show.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain digital copy in the system until no longer of value. Prior to deletion, check with State Archivist for historical value, if none, destroy.

series_title: Ohio Lottery Game Show Drawing / Contestant Paperwork and Game Boards
series_description: 1) Contestant Drum Log - Used to record names of potential contestants. 2) Contestant Call Log - Used to record information from initial contact with contestant. 3) Contestant Log - Lists name, address, city, state, ticket number and show date. Used to record type of identification contestant is using as proof of their identity. 4) Alternate Log - Used to record the number of alternates, which are picked to be used if one of the original eight (8) is invalid. 5) Stand-In Log - Used to record information of stand-in if actual contestant does not appear to play. 6) Contestant Packets - Contains copy of Claim Form, Release for Errors Form, Acknowledgement of Rules Form, Stand-In Forms, if applicable, and Joint Ownership Forms, if applicable. Packets are kept for each contestant on the show. 7) Contestant Prize Log - Used to report dollar value of each contestants’ winnings on a given show. 8) Selling Agent Report- Used to record location of where the Ohio Lottery Game Show contestant ticket was purchased. 9) Game Boards – Semi-Final Game Board, which contains hard copy of location of dollar values, double cards and bonus cards for game number 1 and number 2 of each show. Championship Game Board, which contains positions of names in the Championship Game of each show.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for two (2) year

series_description: Includes news/press releases, publications and press kits issued by the Lottery informing the public about events, activities, and accomplishments.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in system for two (2) years, review for administrative value

series_title: Sales Representative Files on Distribution and Training
series_description: Sales Representative Zip Codes/District Assignments and Distribution Cycle, Route Lists, training schedules, seminar content and instructors, related correspondence between Regional Offices and Marketing Division management and training Department of Lottery Central.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system until information is updated or superseded, or no longer of value

series_description: Records include all internal and external information, correspondence, agency procedures and policies pertinent to merchandising, purchasing, and bid procedures, Request to purchase (RTP), bids and invoices.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system, for five (5) years

series_title: Cash Explosion Random Number Generator (RNG) seal log.
series_description: Computer used as a Random Number Generator (RNG) for Cash Explosion contestant drawings is sealed by Lottery Security when not in use. Seal log notes the seal number installed and removed.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy of seal log in the operating area for one (1) year;

series_description: Records include estimates for jobs, monthly recap of invoices by Marketing Project Authorization (MPA) number, proposals, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for six (6) years and one (1) day after termination of the contract, review for administrative value ; Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for six (6) years and one (1) day after termination of the contract, review for administrative value

series_title: Investigations and Security Department Incident Reports and Investigation File
series_description: This file contains investigations conducted by the Investigations and Security Division, such as altered tickets, attempted cashing of stolen tickets, investigative reports for video lottery terminal facilities, special investigations and complaints, including the original complaint or request for same, result of the investigation, supporting documents, related statements, and affidavits.
retention_statement: Electronic: Ensure all records and supporting documentation are included in the case file in Case Management System. Retain in the system for five (5) years from the date of closure of the case

series_description: File consists of security records, validation of Ohio Lottery regulations and criminal Statutes, and other confidential restricted information as designated by the Deputy Director of Investigations and Security
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area, at the discretion of the Security Director, until declared obsolete;

series_title: High Tier Winning Ticket Security Validations
series_description: Documentation of the confidential process conducted by Lottery Security to validate each High Tier winning online game ticket ($50,000+).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy for four (4) years in a secure area with access limited to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities

series_description: Files contain entry tickets to promotional drawings conducted by the Ohio Lottery.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain tickets in the operating area until promotion has concluded;

series_description: Reports contain updates on regional offices, sales, executive accounts, agent services and technical training. Reports are forwarded to the Executive Director and to the Deputy Directors on a bi-weekly basis. Documents/Records status of on-going projects, events and issues.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital files in the system for one (1) year

series_description: Files contain computer listing of Lottery Agent Number order to include Agent's name, address, city, state, zip code, federal identification number or social security number and total yearly income earned amount. The information is utilized to generate yearly Internal Revenue Form 1099 for income reporting purposes. Two (2) reports are generated; a summary report defining aforementioned information and a detail report listing values, which comprise total income.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for seven (7) years;

series_description: Sales Agent Bonds insured Agents for a designated value.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for two (2) years after agent cancellation date, review for administrative value

series_description: Records contain information and updates of Records Management, Office Services, Inventory Control, Warehouse and Facility Planning. Reports are forwarded to the Executive Director on a weekly basis.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for one (1) year;

series_description: File contains all Instant and On/Line agents, all application forms, correspondence and related material; the Application and Agreement, in conjunction with the submitted Bond, is used for approval of Sales Agent License to sell Ohio Lottery tickets.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for two (2) years after agent cancellation date, review for administrative value

series_title: Equipment Requests and Information for retailer equipment
series_description: File contains copies of applications for new or additional equipment requests.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for one (1) year, review for administrative value, if none ; Electronic: Digital copy will be kept in the system for life of equipment or until no longer needed.

series_description: File contains sensitive personnel information, copies of documents relative to legal situation, copies of security reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the operating area for five (5) years;

series_description: File contains records received from the Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI), and other sources, for the corporations and individuals receiving a video lottery license, individual applicants for traditional lottery licenses, lottery employees and vendors.
retention_statement: Paper: If paper copy exists in operating area, three (3) years ; Electronic: Retain copy digitally in Ohio Lottery database and in hard copy (if exists) in a secure area with access limited to persons who need these records to carry out their duties and responsibilities, for five (5) years

series_description: File contains Hard copy ID badge request forms, vendor security access request forms, Lausche Lottery visitor log, temporary ID card/parking pass log; ID cards issued, and card swipe transactions are recorded electronically.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital information on ID cards in the system for one (1) year after the separation of the employee or vendor employee. Retain digital logs of ID card swipe activity in the system for one (1) year ; Paper: Retain hard copy of Lausche Lottery visitor log and temporary ID card/parking pass log in the Security office for six (6) months

series_description: Record contains all correspondence relating to the Ohio Lottery Commission members.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for two (2) years, review for administrative value, if none

series_description: Record contains all pre-2017 Sales Agent Applications and Agreements. Each Agent Application and Agreement identifies the business ownership, name, address, credit references, answers to questions pertinent to O.R.C. 3770.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area for the duration of active Sales Agent License, plus two (2) years

series_description: Internal procedures on how a drawing is to be conducted. Guidelines for Ohio Lottery Commission employees to follow.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for six (6) years after close of game

series_description: File contains information regarding winners. This includes draw date, sales agent name and ID number, store location, district and region, jackpot amount, winner name and city.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years. After two (2) years check with state Archivist for historical value;

series_description: File consists of sponsorship tickets and backup correspondence for each advertising sponsorship.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years

series_description: File details internal and external correspondence and procedures regarding sales and agent bonds including documents from insurance companies pertinent to bond issuance, copies of pending bonds and sales agent correspondence.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years; ; Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for two (2) years after canclled date of bond;

series_title: Stock Transfer/ Material Manifest File - Outgoing Materials
series_description: File contains current year's Material Manifests displaying all information regarding shipments from Lottery Central to Regional Offices, shipment information, records delivery date, Region Identification, materials shipped, number of cartons, and receipt date. Material Manifests are also used to document the shipment of any materials from Lottery truck to Lottery Headquarters. Will also contain Weaver shredding invoices, state surplus turn-in documents and pallet disposal forms.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for one (1) year.

series_description: File contains Scratch games generated at the Ohio Lottery Commission.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digitally for three (3) years after scratch game is removed from sale and/or two (2) years after vend tape has been executed, or whichever is longer.

series_description: File contains information related to employee philanthropic initiatives.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for two (2) years

series_description: File contains Inter-Department memos and weekly reports.
retention_statement: Electronic: Delete after one year

series_description: Documents supporting Jackpot Game sales (project and actual) to determine the amount of the next jackpot and the authorization document to roll the jackpot to the next amount
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for three (3) years

series_description: Documents supporting a statewide draw game promotion. Includes sales history before, during and after a promotion as well as, research of other lotteries' promotions. Includes supporting documents regarding Task Lists & Timelines, Meeting Minutes, Memos, Point of Sale Materials, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for six (6) years. Retain in cold storage, and

series_description: Documents containing research related to online games. Includes game proposals, game matrix, other lottery games, sales history. Supporting documents for retailer and player focus groups, web surveys and direct mail surveys.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for three (3) years after game close date in the system;

series_description: Documents such as vendors’ correspondence, customer letters, e-mails, and interoffice memos as they relate to online games.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for four (4) years

series_title: Ohio Lottery's Draw Games Internal Control Files
series_description: Files contain the Draw games transaction database, liabilities, validity and balancing information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain reports digitally for three (3) years

series_title: Ohio lottery's Scratch/Draw daily Agent Adjustment, Daily Sales Summary and Claim Files
series_description: Files contain a copy of the Agent Daily sales, Agent daily Adjustments and Claim files.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain reports digitally for three (3) years;

series_description: Reports contains all files generated by Lottery Gaming Intralot system and included: Winners Summary Report for each individual game and drawing, Winners summary report for draw 8498 to 8499, Cashed Ticket Reports, Cashed Purge Ticket Report, Draw Sales Report, Today's Sales Report System, Transaction Report, Uncashed Purge Ticket Report, Whale Report, Added Agents Report, Agent Adjustment Report, Advanced Sales Report, Big Winners Report, On-Line Draw Games Sales Report, Summary On-Line Draw Games Sales Report, Deleted Agents Report, ICS Balancing Report, Agent Key Field Modification Report, Liability Report, Modified Agent Report, Transaction Totals Report, Transaction Distribution By Hour, Cancelled Winners Report, Agent With Zero Sales For Date Period, Week-Ending Zero Sales Report, Cancelled Winners Report, Number Statistics Report, Pool Report, Prize Calculation Report For Draw, each individual games Winner ticket external JFI, Winning ticket Report, Draw Sales Report, Lotto Statistics Report, Share Calculation, Kicker Big Losers, Kicker Big Winners, individual game Winning ticket internal JFI, Winner Summary Report per Draw, Winner Summary Report For Draw, Invoice Tape Report, Invoice Tape Month end, Winners Summary by game, individual games Big Winner Report, Manual Adjustment Report by game, Daily Purge Amount by game, ICS Log, Instant Winner Report individual games draw flat file, Rolling Cash, Mega Millions and Powerball 5 match 5 of 5, Rejected Wager Error Report, Uncashed Ticket Report by game, winner summary by game, Lots Marked Sold Report, Inventory Report, End Lot Report, Inventory Control System Transaction Summary, Adjustment Report Totals, All Agent Daily Report, All Agent Invoice Report, All Agent Week to Date Report, Daily Sales Report, Agent Record Modification, Security Log Audit Report, Warehouse Movement Report, Weekly Sales Commission Update/Report, Destroy High Tier Load, Destroy High Tier Stolen Load, Destroy High all the rest report, Destroy High Tier Stolen Report, Destroy Low Tier all the rest load, Destroy Low Tier Stolen Load, Destroy Low Tier all the rest report, Destroy Low Tier Stolen Report, 90% Cashed Report, Game Information Report, Inventory Control System Financial Summary Table, Inventory Control System Transaction Status Summary, Cross Cashing Report, Daily Commission Transaction Report, Variable Commission Transaction Report, Invoice Commission Transaction Report, Week to Date Tracing Report, Inventory Scan Report, Validation File Scan, Inventory Load, Inventory Load, Report, Inventory by Game, Inventory by Location, Outstanding Inventory Report, Inventory Levels Distribution Report, Vend tape by Game, Vend tape Summary tape, Vend tape all the rest tape, Stolen Vend tape Summary Tape, Stolen Vend tape, Exceptions report for the initial game scratch distribution order, exception report for the daily scratch distribution order, sales rep activity report, retailer report, security report, initial order scratch ticket distribution reconciliation report, daily scratch ticket reconciliation report, sold with Uncashed Prizes, validation high tier load, validation high tier load report, validation low tier load, validation low tier report, credit claims report, headquarter credit claims report, game end by location, game end report missing full location, game end report missing by lot, game end report by partial location, game end report by partial lot.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain reports digitally for five (5) years

series_title: Online and Scratch Daily Sales Reports
series_description: The reports contains the following reports and is run on a daily basis: Partial Status Pool #400, Scratch Ticket Summary Report Inventory By Game #420, Scratch Edit Report Transaction Status Summary (Scratch) #422, Scratch Ticket Liability Report #424, Scratch Ticket Redeemed Balance Report #425, Scratch Ticket Inventory Movement Report #427, Scratch Ticket Claimed Report #428, Scratch Ticket Sales Activity Report #42,9 Daily Scratch Activity Report #430, Weekly Activity Report #431, Scratch Redeem Sales And Adjustments #432, Inventory Control Report #440, Validation Control Report #441, Transaction Total Report #442, Inventory By Game Report #443, Validation By Game Report #444, Retailer Scratch Adjustment Report #445, ICS Auto Balancing Report (Scratch) #499, Retailer Changes Report #531, Terminal Changes Report #534, Reset Files Report #554, Log Edit Report #521, Transaction Status Summary Report #522, Daily Agent Invoice Report #526, Sales By Time Interval Report #529, Retailer Changes Report (On/Line) #531, Winning Numbers #532, Carryover Sales Report #533, Terminal Changes Report #534, Retailer Adjustment Report #535, On/Line-Cashed #536, Winning Number #537, Online Purges-Uncashed Ticket Report #539, Retailer Online Adjustment Report #545, Weekly Agent Invoice Report #546, Reset Files Report (On/Line) #554, General Ledger Report # 560, Draw Sales Summary #561, Winners Report #563, Weekly On/Line Adjustment Report (On/Line) #566, Advanced Sales Report #567,Carryover Consistency Report#569, Tickets Cashed Greater Than 150 Days From Draw (On/Line) #571, Game Summary Report #599, ICS Auto Balancing Report #599, Raffle Report #579
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain three (3) years digitally

series_description: Information is filed by drawing date compiled by Drawing Department Representative. Lists tumblers, ball sets used, number drawn, and note any problems encountered during studio drawings. Approved by State Auditor and Drawing team reps. Seal log notes the seal installed and removed on equipment, doors, cage, ball containers and ball safe used for that respective drawing.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for one (I) year ; Electronic: Retain information in the Drawing Information System for five (5) years;

series_title: Security Programs for Vendors and Contractors
series_description: This file contains reports and security surveys of the physical facilities of vendors and contractors, setting forth the specifications for the protection of products manufactured for the Lottery. Includes reports of Security monitoring of their activities and operations upon termination of each contract.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for six (6) years and one (1) day after the termination of the contract

series_description: Contains information pertaining to stolen ticket reports. Information includes the theft date, case number, agent's name, agent's number, region, lot number and sequence of tickets stolen, total number of tickets stolen.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain any hard copies received in the Operating area for one (1) year ; Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system (on disk/server) for five (5) years

series_description: Report contains current work-product overview and status of on-going matters; for submission to the Office of the Executive Director.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for one (1) year, review for administrative value

series_description: Documents relating to Lottery prize winner files, including but not limited to, Claims Information Systems, child support, back taxes, estate/trust, prize assignments and any other matters relating to prize winner files handled by the Legal Department.
retention_statement: Electronic: Estates: Retain digital copy for seven (7) years following last payment, closing of estate, and/or resolution of legal or other proceedings ; Paper: Passive Trusts (formerly known as blind trusts): Retain for seven (7) years following last payment

series_title: Ohio Lottery Scratch/Draw Games, Ticket Files and Agent Files
series_description: These reports contain the master file of the Scratch/Draw tickets Internal Control File, daily transactions records, daily gross totals of the inventory for the day, daily liability file by day and game, validity files, redeemed ticket files (after game closing), and Lottery’s master agent database at certain time frames, the source programming codes being utilized at that time, the Internal Revenue year end information, the purge claims information for Gaming Vendor.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain reports digitally for three (3) years;

series_description: Disk File Storage Records comprise all records stored on magnetic disks packs or storage units that store a high volume of data on metal platters, i.e. plates. Disks pack storage facilities quick record retrieval and high-volume storage.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain discs for audit cycle, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains documentation that has been submitted to the office of the Ohio Attorney General for collection of delinquent agent accounts, which includes all support documentation to the agent, billing statements and respective bond claims filed, bank letters pertaining to non-sufficient funds or account closed, and agent’s license application.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for fifteen (15) years, review for administrative value for up to forty (40) years total

series_description: File contains Customer Inquiry Forms and non-winning tickets. Customer inquiries are filed by customers that posses a ticket that appears to be a winner but will not validate as a winner on the Lottery's computer system. The file includes the Lottery's Internal Control System results report identifying the reason why the ticket will not validate; cashed, stolen, mutilated, altered, etc. The file may also contain interoffice communications pertaining to the inquiry.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area until the Auditor of State issues final audit report. Scan hard copy ; Electronic: Retain digital copy for seven (7) years from payment date

series_description: File contains reconciliation information pertaining to agent's Non-Transfer of Funds, Credit Returns and/or Non-Transfer of Fund Payments for Instant and On/Line net sales activity, deactivation notice Form, which is prepared by the department on receipt of the bank notification letter. The file also contains support documentation for the daily Check Deposits, to include NTF/DN, Agent Billing, Bonding Company and Payments. Describes the date, requisition number and total deposit for each type.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for (1) year after the Auditor of State issues audit report

series_description: File contains Cancelled Retailer Billing Statements, related support documents and payment information to include a copy of the retailer’s check to satisfy the amount due the Lottery. Also includes paid bond claims, related support documents and payment information including a copy of the bond company check and the associated partial release and assignment.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years, or after the Auditor of State issues audit report; review for administrative value

series_description: File contains Attorney General invoices for payments recovered by the Attorney General and paid to the Lottery for delinquent agent accounts. File includes a listing of each payment made.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for fifteen (15) years, review for administrative value for up to forty (40) years total

series_title: Internal Revenue Service And State of Ohio Completed Tax Form Files
series_description: File contains various notices from the Internal Revenue Service. The notices generally pertain to but are not limited to Lottery Agent and/or prizewinner tax identification numbers variances, withholding tax differences and proposed penalty assessments. This file is maintained in date order within calendar year
retention_statement: Paper: Retain digital and any hard copies in operating area for seven (7) years ; Electronic: Retain digital and any hard copies in operating area for seven (7) years

series_description: File contains correspondence forwarded to and opinions received from the Internal Revenue Service. The correspondence relates to federal tax matters involving Lottery prizewinners and/or Lottery Sales Agents. The file is maintained in alphabetical order by subject matter
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for one (1) year;

series_description: File contains Claim Forms and winning tickets for winners that receive prize payments over a period of years. File may also include legal documents, multiple ownership affidavits, interoffice communications, ticket recovery results reports, security reports, etc. as required, other documents, such as, certified drawing reports may be included in the file for events such as millionaire or special drawings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area until the claim is paid in full, scan into system ; Electronic: Retain digital copy until seven (7) years after the claim is paid in full

series_description: File contains a report of prize and tax voucher totals for each month that include Mobile Cashing and Super Retailer winner payments for initial prize winners. The file may also contain correspondence pertaining to a particular month's activity. The report is filed in month order.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for one (I) year;

series_title: Internal Revenue Service And State of Ohio Reports & Procedures
series_description: File contains procedures and regulations on taxes and reporting information to the Internal Revenue Service and the State of Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy on file as long as procedures and regulations are in effect;

series_description: File contains Contracts that have encumbrances/purchase orders (from OhioBuys).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for six (6) years and one (1) day from the termination of the contract, review for administrative value

series_description: File includes supporting documentation for the following bank accounts; Gross Revenue Account and Bank Cashing Account held by the Lottery's vendor bank and three (3) Star Ohio Accounts. Supporting documentation for the Gross Revenue account with the Lottery's current vendor bank includes but is not limited to; Ohio Lottery Commission Daily Investments and Reconciliation forms, Ohio Lottery Commission Daily Gross Fund Transaction Register, Treasurer of State Daily Receipts, Disbursements and Balances, Weekly Revenue Receipts and Holding Account Redistribution Form, a copy of vendor bank's monthly Statement including debit and credit slips and other miscellaneous supporting documentation. Supporting documentation for the Bank Cashing account with the Lottery's current vendor bank includes but is not limited to Ohio Lottery Commission Daily Bank Cashing Reconciliation Form, Ohio Lottery Commission Daily Authorization Receipt Slips and a copy of the vendor bank's monthly statement including debit and credit slips. Supporting documentation for the Star Ohio accounts include but are not limited to; one (1) Star Ohio Daily Account Activity Statement and two (2) Star Ohio Monthly Account Activity Statements.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for seven (7) years after Auditor of State issues audit report for that fiscal year

series_description: File contains 5754 IRS tax forms identifying those persons that split prize winnings for prizes of $600.00 to $5,000.00. The form indicates the Claim Number of the individual that collected the prize winnings. The form includes each person's name, address, city, state, zip code, social security number and amount of winnings for all persons that shared in the prize. The 5754 file is arranged in Claim Number order by calendar year.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for one (1) year; ; Electronic: Retain the digital copy in system for four (4) years;

series_description: Record contains internal correspondence including, but not limited to, internal memos and related documents forwarded to and/or received from all other divisions and/or sections.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for four (4) years, review for administrative value, if none

series_description: File contains various notices from the Internal Revenue Service. The notices generally pertain to but are not limited to Lottery Agent and/or prizewinner tax identification numbers variances, withholding tax differences and proposed penalty assessments. This file is maintained in date order within calendar year
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in the operating area for one (1) year;

series_description: File contains Ohio Lottery General Purchase Requisition forms, which are required to be completed for all purchases of goods/services to be submitted to (OhioBuys). The file is maintained by purchase requisition number, date, and user OHID.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain all purchase requisitions directly related to a contract for six (6) years and one (1) day after termination of the contract, review for administrative value ; Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for four (4) years, after the Auditor of State issues audit report, review for administrative value

series_title: One Time Prize Payments with Voucher File
series_description: File contains all prize payments paid through state warrant processing, which includes claim form, original bet ticket, cash/pay ticket, and other supporting documentation (legal documents, security reports, ticket recovery results reports, inter-office communications, etc.) The file also contains a pre-voucher summary and voucher report from Claims Information System (CIS), a VSU summary and VSU documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for seven (7) years from payment date ; Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area until the Auditor of State issues final audit report. Scan hard copy

series_description: File contains game rules and executive orders created to compensate for emergencies relative to Ohio Lottery games wherein the necessity exists to waive the standard rule generating the procedure due to time constraints.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for five (5) years after the effective date of the instant rule and indefinitely for an online rule, send to State Archive for potential historical value, if none found, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains pleadings, motions, correspondence, and evidence for new, pending or closed legal claims.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for seven (7) years after the statute of limitations for further appeals has expired; review for administrative value

series_description: Contracts and related correspondence pertaining to personal service contracts.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for six (6) years after the life of the contract in accordance with O.R.C. 2305.06, plus one (1) year; review for administrative value

series_description: A word document created within the Central Office of Sales monthly, sent out monthly. Report contains both current and new instant and online games coming out, new policies, and current and upcoming promotions.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for one (1) year

series_title: Internal Audit Organization and Management Documents
series_description: Internal Audit organization and management documents, including internal audit charter, audit committee charter, audit plan, internal audit policies, internal audit procedures, other managerial documents
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy until superseded, obsolete or replaced. Archive for three (3) fiscal years

series_description: Audit Committee Meeting Documents, which consists of quarterly meeting agendas and previous meeting minutes.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for four (4) years from the close of fiscal year

series_title: Internal Audit Workpapers and Audit Reports
series_description: Files include Internal Audit documentation of the various Lottery transaction cycles reviewed for a specific fiscal year. Each transaction cycle audited (reviewed) has a file- binder (digital) of working ‘papers’ to support the review
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in the applications database for the duration of the audit; once all action items are completed or within five (5) years, move to Final Audit/Engagement Reports (see separate retention schedule)

series_description: File contains Weekly Reports from Executive to the Governor's Office, which provides a summary of the Agency's activities for the week.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years, review for administrative value, if none

series_description: Files contain Administrative Rule filings, including but not limited to, Common Sense Initiative correspondence, Business Impact Analysis, Joint Commission on Agency Rule Review (JCARR) hearing information, Public Hearing transcripts, Rule Summary Fiscal Analysis, and other rule related documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for five (5) years or until superseded by new version, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains all delinquent agent claim files and license suspension/revocation hearing information, including: correspondence, original evidentiary materials, transcripts, legal opinions, and final orders for the Ohio Lottery Sales Agents (Retailers), Ohio Lottery Sales Agents (Retailers) Applicants, Video Lottery Sales Agents and their employees.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years after the statute of limitations for further appeals has expired; review for administrative value

series_title: Instant and On-Line Bids, Proposals and Contracts
series_description: Record includes all bids and proposals submitted by instant ticket vendors for instant ticket Lottery games; all bids and proposals submitted by On-Line vendors for On-Line Lottery games including "Request for Qualification", (RFQ's); "Invitation to Bid", (ITB's); "Request for Proposal", (RFP's), Pre-Bid conference material and other relevant information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for six (6) years and one (1) day after contract termination

series_title: Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee Application/Agreement
series_description: File contains all Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee materials, all application forms, correspondence, and related material.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain copy in a secure area with access limited only to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities for two (2) years after Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee cancellation date, review administrative value

series_title: Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee Application / Agreement
series_description: Records contain all current Key Gaming Employee Applications and Agreements. Each Video Lottery Termina Key Gaming Employee Application and Agreement identifies the name, address, personal information, answers to questions pertinent to O.R.C. 3770 and applicants notarized signature. The Application and Agreement is used for approval of Video Lottery Termina Key Gaming Employee to sell Ohio Lottery products. Files are maintained within rotary file, in numerical Agent Number order.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain copy in a secure area with access limited only to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities (which is continually updated and maintained for duration of active Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee License). Upon license cancellation, the records are moved to the Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee Application / Agreement Schedule 950-0910.

series_description: Copies of manifests, waivers, approvals of Video Lottery Terminal shipped to Racino.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain copies for six (6) months

series_title: Minimum Internal Controls, Operating Procedures, and Regulatory Documents
series_description: File contains Minimum Internal Controls, Operating Procedures, and Regulatory Documents, and all related materials (i.e. violations, fines, sanctions, etc.)
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain digital copy for three (3) years, or until superseded, review for administrative value

series_description: Internal Control System (ICS) server cabinets at gaming system vendor location and at backup site are sealed by Lottery Security. Seal log notes the seal number installed and removed on each cabinet door.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for one (1) year, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains executed game requirements that detail ticket description, game description, game specifications, fonts, prize structure, packing and shipping, delivery schedule and authorization to print instant game.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office area for four (4) years after closing of game ; Electronic: Retain digital record in system for four (4) years after the closing of the game, review for administrative value, if none, destroy.

series_title: Responsible Gaming Marketing, Outreach and Educational Materials
series_description: File contains materials related to Responsible Gaming marketing, outreach and education materials
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for one (1) year after the specific campaign, check with state for transfer, if none, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains information and correspondence related to the Time Out Ohio Program (formerly known as the voluntary exclusion program). Inquiries through e-mail.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retention period for application related materials – Retain for 30 days- review for administrative value – ; Electronic: Retention period for correspondence one (1) year;

series_description: File contains documents created for purposes of certifications
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for the life of the specific certification, plus one (1) year

series_description: The Bi-Weekly report contains general overview information of the Responsible Gaming Division to the Executive Director
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for one (1) year, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains contracts and memoranda, ancillary documents, correspondence, addendums, sponsorships, etc. related to Responsible Gaming contracts, whether a party to the contract directly or indirectly
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for the life of the contract/agreement, plus six (6) years and one (1) day in accordance with O.R.C. 2305.06.

series_description: File contains daily proprietor operations summaries, proprietor violations, findings, and assessments, procedures for applicable proprietor processes. Contains annual sports gaming IT systems audit reports performed by an independent third party, general maintenance of systems, compliance, and vulnerability/penetration testing. Contains records of annual internal audit by separate internal audit department and/or a third-party independent accounting firm. Annual financial statement audited by independent auditor. Annual internal regulator audits that include proprietor site visits. Marketing submissions and approvals. Equipment shipments, removals, disposals, software updates, re-certifications, and any other pertinent changes, updates or upgrades.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital files for five (5) years

series_description: File contains signed contract between proprietor and Ohio Lottery.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital file for six (6) years and one (1) day beyond the end of the contract

series_description: File contains annual plan, bulletins, event wagering system operating standard, financial processing, GLI, marketing and advertising, MICS, promotional program, responsible gambling, security planning, terminal standards, and wagering device shipment.
retention_statement: Electronic: Review and update yearly, old digital standards retained for two (2) years

series_description: File contains monthly invoices for each proprietor, monthly proprietor financial reports, and a summary of total proprietor sales, proprietor share, Lottery share, and unclaimed funds amounts. Items related to type C host collections of funds.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital files for five (5) years;

series_description: File contains all actionable items to be completed prior to exiting the Ohio Type C Sports Gaming market including equipment removal, host partner notification, notification to players, financial requirements, Lottery contract obligations, administrative operations, and mutually agreed final wager acceptance date.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital files for five (5) years, Review for administrative value;

series_description: File contains bi-weekly report of activity including statistical data, progress of on-going projects, summary of reports, and changes or issues.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital files for one (1) year

series_description: File contains host location audits, includes licensing reviews, liquor licensing reviews, equipment reviews, yearly reviews, active retailers, and all pre-qualified retailer locations.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital files for three (3) years; review for administrative value;

series_description: File contains internal and external customer communication; brochures, documents, presentations, newsletters, staff training, website information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital files for two (2) years

series_description: Requests and approval workflows for all draw game promotions; Includes retailer, chain, district, regional and statewide promotions.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain all statewide promotions for three (3) years in system; move to cold storage for three (3) years ; Electronic: Retain all individual retailer, chain, region, district promotions for one (1) year in system; move to cold storage for three (3) years

series_description: Overview of draw games. Includes game matrix information, vendor, game rules, artwork, how to play information, changes, miscellaneous information, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for three (3) years; move to cold storage for four (4) years

series_description: Documents supporting the development and implementation of new on-line games. This is research of other lotteries’ game information. Includes supporting documents regarding Task Lists & Timelines, Meeting Minutes, Memos, Point of Sale Materials, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for seven (7) years

series_title: BCI Ticket Testing Reports and Receipts.
series_description: File contains hard copy of analytical reports received from BCI regarding scientific testing of scratch off tickets.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for five (5) years in hard copy format in a secure area with access limited only to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities, review for administrative value, if none

series_description: Digital recordings of the drawing studio and machines used for all daily drawings.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in system (on disk/server) for 365 days

series_description: Final Audit or Advisory Reports or Consulting Engagements.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for 15 years

series_description: All Lottery terminal game final specifications and addendums.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy until game has been removed from sale for two (2) years, review for administrative value

series_description: All reports and winning numbers related to fast draw games, like Keno and Lucky One.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain CDs and/or digital copies for three (3) years

series_description: This report contains an explanation regarding any exceptions to normal processing of the Ohio Lottery Commission, Gaming System operating system for a given day. This report includes a clear, concise explanation of the exception situation, including action taken.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for six (6) years and one (1) day after the termination of the contract

series_description: Records of employee’s machinery training.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for three (3) years, destroy upon re-certification, whichever occurs first .

series_description: Files contain correspondence, general Lottery information and delivery schedules.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copies for 1 year

series_description: File contains information regarding forklifts, pallet wrapper, pallet scale, shredder, tow motor inspections, certifications for machinery, and other large machinery used within the warehouse. Manuals, warranty, and maintenance history.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copies for the life of the unit.

series_description: File contains current year's Packing Slips and Bills of Lading representing shipments of point of sale, promotional merchandise and anything else received to warehouse from vendors. Specific information on the Packing Slip includes date
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area for one (1) year;

series_title: Data Research Materials for Historical Revenue Studies
series_description: File contains data research materials for historical revenue studies.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for three (3) years, review for administrative value, transfer to State Archivist for historical value, if none

series_title: Strategic Plans and the Planning Working Files
series_description: File contains strategic plans for a specific period of time, varying budgets, depending on operational needs, and all accompanying documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for four (4) years, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains bi-weekly report of activity including data, strategic planning, reports, studies, workbooks, and changes or issues.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for one (1) year, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains historical scripts, workbooks, and other documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for four (4) years, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains in-house working documents, instructional materials, necessary to access systems and perform workflows.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superseded or obsoleted, review for administrative value

series_title: Business Intelligence Application Files Tableau Report and Master File
series_description: File/Application contains Tableau Reports
retention_statement: Electronic: Review yearly, retain until superseded or obsoleted, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains vending activity, reports (sales, reconciliation documentation, inventory, deposit receipts).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital files in system for five (5) years, review for administrative value

series_description: Files include general regional records, maintained by regional secretary, standard correspondence with agents and the public regarding operational policies, information on current Lottery games, including procedures, general staff directives, and policy statements.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years;

series_description: Monthly report contains any liquidated damages contemplated, including correspondence, data, and investigative outcomes.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for six (6) years and one (1) day after termination of the contract

series_description: File contains correspondence with outside counsel regarding Lottery and or vendor Trademarks, including, but not limited to, clearance search materials to certify good faith in adoption of mark, application and registration, trademark certificates, specimens, attorney work product, documents retained to prove ownership of trademark and priority of use, and other related documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital records for 5 years after the discontinued use of the Trademark ; Electronic: If it is decided to not use a Trademark, retain digital copy for 3 years and 1 day after it expires

series_title: Original Bet Ticket Returns from Retailers
series_description: File contains the original winning ticket and pink claim (lower portion) transmittal copy received from the Lottery Retailers. The winning tickets are exchanged at the agent location for a Pay to Bearer negotiable instrument entitling the winner to collect their winnings. The winning tickets and Claim copies are filed in date-received order.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for seven (7) years ; Paper: Retain hard copy in the operating area until the claim is paid in full, scan into system

series_description: File contains but is not limited to the following monthly Financial Statement analysis generated by the Ohio Lottery Commission: Financial Statements, Journal Entries, Ticket Sales Register, Cash and Investments, Accounts Receivable, Prepaid Expenses, Fixed Assets, Accounts payable, Due to other Agencies, Accrued Payroll, Deferred revenue, Prize payable, Deferred Prizes, Retained Earnings, Purges, Compensated Absences and other miscellaneous subsidiary records (reconciliation and supporting documentation)
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for seven (7) years after Auditor of State issues audit report for that fiscal year

series_description: Retain digital copy, which is continually updated and maintained for duration of active Sales Agent License, for two (2) years after agent cancellation date; then transfer to Cancelled Agents Application/ Agreement/Bonds file see 950-0630).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy, which is continually updated and maintained for duration of active Sales Agent License, after agent cancellation date, transfer to Cancelled Agents Application/ Agreement/Bonds file 950-0630 For cancellation/denial applications, retain for two (2) years

series_description: File includes support documentation for on/line and instant game adjustments for credit and or debits, processed via lottery contracted vendors systems. Adjustments pertain to ticket redemptions, returned tickets, stolen tickets, agent request for adjustment, agent reimbursements (cash advances).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years (when report/information is submitted digitally) after audit report is received

series_title: Non-Gaming Video Lottery Racetrack employee applications.
series_description: Records contain all applications for non-gaming Video Lottery Terminal racetrack licenses; including all forms, correspondence and/or documents related thereto.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain copy in operating area for two (2) years;

series_title: Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee Application/Agreement
series_description: Records contain all current Gaming Employee Applications and Agreements. Each Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee Application and Agreement identifies the name, address, personal information, answers to questions pertinent to O.R.C. 3770.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain copy in a secure area with access limited only to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities (which is continually updated and maintained for duration of active Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee License). Upon license cancellation, the records are moved to the Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee Application / Agreement Schedule 950-1011

series_title: Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider Application/Agreement
series_description: Records contain all current Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider Applications and Agreements. Each Application and Agreement identifies the business ownership, name, address, credit references, answers to questions pertinent to O.R.C. 3770 and applicant’s notarized signature. The Application and Agreement is used for approval of Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider License to do business with Ohio Lottery Licensed Video Lottery Terminal Racetracks
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in a secure area with access limited to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities, which is continually updated and maintained for duration of active Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider License and two (2) years after license cancellation date;

series_title: Certifications from the Ohio Lottery to licensed Test Laboratories
series_description: Electronically submitted information regarding certification of files pertaining to machines and games.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain files for life of the game, or until superseded or software revocation is issued;

series_description: Annual documents submitted by Racetracks yearly, including the business plan, MBE plan, staff training plans, promotional spend, and advertising.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for two (2) years and

series_title: Compliance Reports and All Associated Files
series_description: Documents related to the review of racetrack operations for compliance with lottery operating procedures including audit reports, racetrack responses, racetrack procedures, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in system for six (6) years and one (1) day after the termination of license

series_description: Electronic files including documents related to game themes, game artwork, denomination, and pay tables for each that are submitted to the Commission for approval.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain digital copy for three (3) years after game is no longer in service, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains documents submitted by Video Lottery Sales Agents (Racino); including event specifications, financial proforma, yearly promotional plans, and anticipated financial promotional projections for the year.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain digital copy for two (2) years

series_description: File contains a report that is sent monthly from Video Lottery Sales Agent (Racino) to the Lottery.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain digital copy for two (2) years

series_title: Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee Application Agreement
series_description: File contains all Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee materials, all application forms, correspondence, and related material.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain copy in a secure area with access limited only to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities for two (2) years after Video Lottery Terminal Gaming Employee cancellation date, review administrative value

series_description: Reports of Prize Intercept invoices, amounts to be swept from the Video Lottery Sales Agents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain digital copy for five (5) years; or until final reconciliation

series_title: Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider Application / Agreement
series_description: Files contain all Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider materials, all application forms, correspondence, and related material.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in a secure area with access limited only to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities for six (6) years and one (1) day after Video Lottery Terminal Technology Provider cancellation;

series_title: Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Racetrack Application /Agreement
series_description: File contains all Video Lottery Terminal Racetrack materials, all application forms, correspondence, and related material.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain digital copy of all application materials for six (6) years and one (1) day after termination of the agreement

series_description: Records contain all current Video Lottery Terminal Racetrack Applications, Agreements and third-party reports. Each application and agreement identifies the business ownership, name, address, credit references, answers to questions pertinent to O.R.C. 3770 and applicant’s notarized signature. The application and agreement is used for approval of Video Lottery Terminal Racetrack License to sell Ohio Lottery products.
retention_statement: Electronic: Maintain digital copy of all application materials for six (6) years and one (1) day after termination of the agreement

series_title: Video Lottery Sales Agent non-Gaming Employee - Security Files (Racetrack)
series_description: File contains records related to Video Lottery Non-Gaming Employee Applications and other Video Lottery Employee licensing related information.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in a secure area with access limited to persons who need these records to carry out their duties and responsibilities, for two (2) years, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains campaign, program, sales, and retail support artwork assets, created for Marketing on different print media (e.g., cling, poster, sticker, HTP, headers, print work for tickets/draws, video files, audio files, removable drives.)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in operating area for 2 years, review for administrative value, if none ; Electronic: Retain digital copy in operating area for 2 years, review for administrative value, if none

series_description: File contains information regarding winners from Marketing Programs/Promotions. This includes program name, draw date, winner information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years. After two (2) years check with state Archivist for historical value;

series_description: Files contain game requirements and all pertinent information for Multi-State and Monitor games launched.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in the system until after the close of the game, review for administrative value, if none, destroy.

series_description: Files include system backup files, operating system, and any other file that makes up the server.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital files in the system for 90 days, they

series_description: Files contain the list of data processing files used to execute computer programs for maintenance of the computer system.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain copy in the system for three (3) months or until update is received

series_description: Files contain computer listing of Lottery Prize Winner information to include name, address, city, state, zip code, federal identification number or social security number and total prizes won in the previous calendar year. The information is utilized to generate yearly Internal Revenue Form W2G for income reporting purposes. Two (2) reports are generated; a summary report defining aforementioned information and a detail report listing values, which comprise total prizes won in the previous calendar year.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for seven (7) years;

series_description: File contains log of employee access to Confidential Personal Information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy of record for two (2) years

series_description: Software and all documentation related to software licenses used by the agency.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy until software and software licenses are no longer used

series_description: Annual software user audits.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for two (2) years

series_description: Surveys on demographics, sales agent preferences regarding games, procedures and other various Marketing Research Studies.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for two (2) years, review for administrative value

series_description: File contains Legal Counsel’s meeting agenda and recommendations related to pending applicants or agents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for six (6) months

series_description: Files contain vehicle mileage, driver, maintenance, fuel purchase history.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copies for six (6) months after submitted

series_description: File contains weekly sales reports, derivative sales research, by district, by region and statewide and related research studies.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for two (2) years

series_description: Copies of receipts detailing all information pertaining to sales agents return of Lots of instant tickets (partial or whole books) through the Regional Office to Lottery Central.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain hard copy in operating area for six (6) months, review for administrative value

series_title: Ohio Lottery Game Show Entry tickets
series_description: Contain non-selected Ohio Lottery Game Show entry tickets.
retention_statement: Paper: Retail tickets in the operating area for three (3) months;

series_description: Files contain reports from Back Office System showing transfers and destruction of thermal paper. Transfers from Vendor to warehouse, warehouse to regional office, and any returned paper (damaged, destroyed, etc.).
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain on SharePoint for one (1) year

series_description: File consists of contracts, correspondence and proof of performance recap report.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy in the system for six (6) years and one (1) day after termination of the contract;

series_title: Contract info for Software, Ticket Security, On-line Ticket Stock, Instant Ticket Vending Machine
series_description: Records includes all bids and proposals submitted by these various vendors including; Request for Proposal (RFP's), Request of Validation, Invitation to Bid, pre-bid conference materials and other relevant information.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital copy for six (6) years and one (1) day; review for administrative value

series_description: File contains the following reports for each month ending the Fiscal Year and reflects all equipment purchases by the Ohio Lottery Commission over $300.00: Asset Acquisition Report, Depreciation Report and the Asset Master Report.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain digital information in the system for seven (7) years after Auditor of State issues audit report
